bottom_line: Tighten workflow handoff contracts (agent resolution, report naming, and browser env bootstrap) to reduce orchestration-driven retries.
coverage_notes: Read S01/S02/S03/S05/S15/S16 logs fully (all <1 MB). Sampled S14 retry/fix-cycle signal from S16 log inventory plus S14_fix1 excerpt. DB telemetry available (db-identity check passed).

findings.title: Self-assess step fell back to default agent because mapped agent was unresolved
findings.recommendation: Validate workflow agent labels before launch and fail fast when an `opencode_agent` is not resolvable.
evidence: ai-dev/logs/CR-00057_S16_run1.log:1 — 'agent "self-assess-impl" not found. Falling back to default agent'
findings.paste_prompt: /iw-new-cr Add preflight validation that every workflow opencode_agent resolves before step launch; motivated by CR-00057 self-assess fallback (see ai-dev/active/CR-00057/reports/CR-00057_self_assess_report.md).

findings.title: Qv-browser remediation path assumes an app service that is absent in this E2E stack
findings.recommendation: Update browser verification guidance to use the supported reseed/sync path for this compose topology instead of `docker compose exec app`.
evidence: ai-dev/active/CR-00057/reports/CR-00057_S15_QvBrowser_report.md:7 — 'Attempted remediation path ... but `app` service was not running.'
findings.paste_prompt: /iw-new-cr Update browser-verification reseed instructions to match the real E2E compose services and remove `exec app` assumption; see CR-00057 self-assess report for evidence.

findings.title: Step report filename casing drift breaks cross-step reads
findings.recommendation: Enforce canonical report filename casing at step completion and align prompt templates to the same convention.
findings.paste_prompt: /iw-new-cr Standardize and validate step report filename casing at `iw step-done` to prevent cross-step handoff failures; evidence in CR-00057 self-assess report.

findings.title: Late-stage quality gates required many reruns/fix-cycles without concise retry telemetry
findings.recommendation: Add retry-budget telemetry and auto-summarized top retry causes for S10-S15 transitions.
evidence: ai-dev/logs/CR-00057_S16_run1.log:86 — 'CR-00057_S14_fix1.log' (listing also shows fix2..fix7 and run16..run22)
findings.paste_prompt: /iw-new-cr Add per-step retry-budget telemetry and summarized retry-cause reporting in fix-cycle orchestration for late QV gates; see CR-00057 self-assess findings.
